ddls:
CREATE TABLE "small_molecules" (
  "small_molecule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each small molecule */,
  "small_molecule_name" TEXT /* Name of the small molecule */,
  "hms_lincs_id" TEXT /* HMS LINCS ID of the small molecule */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the small molecule was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the small molecule entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the small molecule entry was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the small molecule entry */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the small molecule */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the small molecule */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Link or path to the structure file */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the small molecule (e.g., synthesized in-house, purchased from a supplier) */,
  "synthesis_date" TEXT /* Date the small molecule was synthesized or received */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the small molecule if purchased */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the small molecule */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Recommended storage conditions for the small molecule */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Current availability of the small molecule (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("small_molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "hms_lincs_id" INTEGER /* HMS LINCS ID of the protein */,
  "protein_type" TEXT /* Type of the protein (e.g., kinase, phosphatase) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the protein was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the protein entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the protein entry was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the protein entry */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the amino acid sequence */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* UniProt ID of the protein */,
  "expression_system" TEXT /* Expression system used to produce the protein */,
  "purification_method" TEXT /* Method used to purify the protein */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Recommended storage conditions for the protein */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Current availability of the protein (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_protein_type FOREIGN KEY ("protein_type") REFERENCES protein_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assay_results" (
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay result */,
  "small_molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the small molecule used in the assay */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein used in the assay */,
  "percent_control" REAL /* Percentage control of the assay result */,
  "assay_compound_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the assay compound */,
  "concentration_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the concentration (e.g., uM, nM) */,
  "assay_date" TEXT /* Date the assay was conducted */,
  "assay_method" TEXT /* Method used for the assay */,
  "assay_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assay */,
  "assay_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the assay */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the assay was conducted */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH at which the assay was conducted */,
  "buffer_solution" TEXT /* Buffer solution used in the assay */,
  "replicates" INTEGER /* Number of replicates performed */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the results */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the results */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assay_results_concentration_unit FOREIGN KEY ("concentration_unit") REFERENCES concentration_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assay_results_small_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("small_molecule_id") REFERENCES small_molecules ("small_molecule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assay_results_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assay_results_assay_method FOREIGN KEY ("assay_method") REFERENCES assay_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the role can delete data */,
  "can_export" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the role can export data */,
  "can_import" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the role can import data */,
  "can_share" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the role can share data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assay_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the assay method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assay method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the method was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the method was last updated */,
  "method_protocol" TEXT /* Link or path to the detailed protocol of the assay method */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or citations related to the assay method */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used in the assay method */,
  "validity_period" TEXT /* Validity period of the assay method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concentration_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concentration unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the concentration unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the concentration unit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the unit was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the unit was last updated */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit (e.g., molar) */,
  "standard_unit" TEXT /* Standard unit to which the concentration unit can be converted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the type was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the type was last updated */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the protein type (e.g., family, class) */,
  "functional_domains" TEXT /* Functional domains of the protein type */,
  "pathways" TEXT /* Biological pathways in which the protein type is involved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assay_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay related to the log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the action was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assay_logs_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assay_results ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assay_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "small_molecule_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "small_molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the small molecule related to the log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the action was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_small_molecule_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_small_molecule_logs_small_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("small_molecule_id") REFERENCES small_molecules ("small_molecule_id")
)
